6.  **Chambers of Commerce**: London Chamber of Commerce, 1, 2 & 3, Oxford Court, Cannon Street, London E. C. 4.
7.  **Cheese Manufacturers**: Alpina Cheese Co., Ltd. (in boxes), Burgdorf.
8.  **Chemical Manufacturers**:

    *   Chemical Works Flora (for perfume trade, confectionery etc., insecticide), Dübendorf, Zurich.
    *   Chemische Fabrik vorm. Sandoz (dyestuffs), Basle.
    *   Clayton Aniline Co., Ltd. (dyestuffs), Ashton New Road, Clayton, Manchester.
    *   Durand & Huguenin, A.-G. (pharmaceutical), Basle.
    *   Herbert Green & Co., Ltd. (alcohol, ethyl, fusel oil) Ruskin Chambers, Scale Lane, Hull.
    *   Hoffmann-La Roche & Co. (pharmaceutical), Basle.
    *   Th. Mühlethaler, S. A. (synthetic), Nyon.
    *   Society of Chemical Industry in Basle (dyestuffs), Basle.
    *   Usines de l'Allondon (synthetic) La Plaine, Geneva.
9.  **Chocolate Manufacturers**:
    *   Chocolats de Villars, S. A., Fribourg.
    *   Nestlé & Anglo-Swiss Condensed Milk Co., Vevey.
    *   Peter, Cailler, Kohler, La Tour-de-Peilz.
